xp_lamp_small.description: Grants 10,000 XP to a chosen skill.

xp_lamp_large.description: Grants 50,000 XP to a chosen skill.

tricksters_amulet.description: A lucky charm worn by carnival performers. Grants a small combat edge.

strongmans_sigil.description: A heavy iron ring etched with the mark of the strongman champion. Boosts Strength.

carnival_cape.description: A vibrant cape worn by carnival champions. Grants 5% more tickets from Carnival sessions.

juggling_imp.description: A mischievous imp that juggles your worries away. Boosts all skill XP by 3%.
